creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Wed Dec 18 15:49:52 2013
New Revision: 336842
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336842

Log:
  - Update to 1.224
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support STAGEDIR
  
  PR:		ports/184702
  Submitted by:	sunpoet

Modified:
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango/Makefile
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango/Makefile	Wed Dec 18 15:41:07 2013	(r336841)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango/Makefile	Wed Dec 18 15:49:52 2013	(r336842)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Pango
-PORTVERSION=	1.223
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.224
 CATEGORIES=	x11-toolkits lang perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:XAOC
@@ -12,6 +11,8 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	swills@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl module for layout and render i18n text
 
+LICENSE=	LGPL21
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-ExtUtils-Depends>=0.300:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-Depends \
 		p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig>=1.03:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig \
 		p5-Cairo>=1:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-Cairo \
@@ -21,11 +22,6 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Glib2>=1.220:${PORTSDIR}
 USE_GNOME=	pango
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
-MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-post-install:
-	@cd ${WRKSRC}/blib/man3 && ${FIND} * -name "*.3" | ${SED} \
-		's,^,${MAN3PREFIX:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}/man/man3/,' >> ${TMPPLIST}
+MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango/distinfo	Wed Dec 18 15:41:07 2013	(r336841)

+SHA256 (Pango-1.224.tar.gz) = 39d7b506729f81ecbfb986b2b50020d6a6b9a118df4a140de92dbfd9ca8dae72
+SIZE (Pango-1.224.tar.gz) = 46017
